"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\mydb.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\phrav\scoop\apps\gcc\current\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\mydb.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\mydb.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\phrav\scoop\apps\gcc\current\bin\g++.exe -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\mydb.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o mydb.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmydb.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\mydb.dir\linkLibs.rsp
